isolation.cartState: client-side only, isolated per browser session

assertions.title: Login page renders with tabbed form

steps.expected: Account login page displayed with tabbed form
steps.observed: Page loaded with 'Welcome Back' heading, LOGIN and REGISTER tabs visible

steps.action: Verify Login tab is active by default
steps.expected: Login tab selected with Email and Password fields
steps.observed: LOGIN tab active with underline, EMAIL field, PASSWORD field, FORGOT PASSWORD? link, and SIGN IN button displayed

steps.expected: Register tab shows registration form fields
steps.observed: REGISTER tab activated showing FIRST NAME, LAST NAME, EMAIL, PASSWORD, CONFIRM PASSWORD fields, and CREATE ACCOUNT button

steps.action: Click SIGN IN with empty fields
steps.expected: Validation errors shown for email and password
steps.observed: Red-bordered email field with 'Email is required' error, red-underlined password field with 'Password is required' error

steps.action: Fill email with invalid value 'notanemail' and submit
steps.expected: Validation error for invalid email format
steps.observed: 'Please enter a valid email address' error shown under email field, 'Password is required' still shown for empty password

evidence.network: No network requests — validation is client-side

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-ACCT-001 confirmed login page renders with tabbed form (Login/Register tabs with appropriate fields). VAL-ACCT-002 confirmed login form validates email (required + format) and password (required) with visible error messages.
